fields.description: The full JSON key of the Google Cloud service account used for ALL Drive automation (project/customer/opportunity folders, attachment sync, call-recording exports). The account's client_email must be added as a Content Manager on the Shared Drive(s) below. Use the Test Connection button after changing this.
fields.label: Service Account JSON

fields.description: The Shared Drive that holds the per-customer folders and the project folder trees (the ID is the part of the Shared Drive's URL after /folders/ or /drive/).
fields.label: Shared Drive ID

fields.description: Subfolders created inside every new project folder. Rows may be limited to a Project Type; paths nest with / (e.g. "Project Manager/Pictures"). Empty table = the default set (Accounting & Legal, Build, Design, Project Manager/Pictures).
fields.label: Subfolders

fields.description: Create a top-level Drive folder (named after the customer) in the Shared Drive whenever a Customer is created. Project provisioning reuses the same folder, and its ID is stored on the Customer record.
fields.label: Create Customer Folders on Customer Creation

fields.description: Create a Drive folder inside the customer's folder for every new Customer-party Opportunity (named "<Opportunity> — <Title>").
fields.label: Create Opportunity Folders on Opportunity Creation

fields.description: Two-way sync between ERPNext attachments and the linked Drive folders of Projects, Customers and Opportunities: new ERPNext attachments are uploaded to Drive; new Drive files appear as link-only shadow attachments (hourly). Deletions never propagate. Every action is recorded in the Drive Sync Log.
fields.label: Enable Attachment Sync

fields.description: Google Drive folder ID that receives every call recording and Twilio voicemail (plus a companion transcript .txt), organised into monthly YYYY_MM subfolders (e.g. the Operations Share Drive folder). The service account above must be a member of the Shared Drive containing this folder. Leave empty to disable the export.
fields.label: Call Recordings Folder ID
